title: MorrowindMod
description: A minimal mod that adds items from The Elder Scrolls: Morrowind.
body:
Morrowind mod is an open source fabric mod that adds a few items from The Elder Scrolls: Morrowind.

It currently adds two items Moon Sugar and Skooma, which give great status effects at the cost of nausea and hunger.

## Installation
Make sure you have the latest version of [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) installed. Afterwards, all you need to do is simply drop the mod into the mods folder.

## Version
The mod currently supports Minecraft version 1.18.2
